---
name: Documentation update
about: Request corrections or improvements to docs, examples, and guides
title: "docs: "
labels: ["documentation", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Affected page(s)

List file path(s) that need editorial remediation, for example:

- `README.md`
- `docs/syntax.md`
- `specs/jave-v0.1.md`

## What is wrong or missing?

Describe the inaccuracy, omission, or unclear phrasing.

## Suggested correction

Provide exact replacement text or a clear direction for the rewrite.

## Version context

- [ ] Applies to v0.1 behavior
- [ ] Applies to post-v0.1 roadmap content
- [ ] I verified this against current examples/tests
- [ ] I determined this was not a failure in my own understanding

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, governance references, or related issues.
